name: Norddampf Relict Dosing Capsules
summary: Norddampf Relict Dosing Capsules — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Designed for fast, mess-free sessions, the Norddampf Stainless Steel Dosing Capsules are the ideal accessory for RELICT vaporiser users who value convenience and cleanliness. Built for pre-packing and portability, these durable capsules let your customers load dry herb in advance, perfect for retail environments that serve active or on-the-go consumers. Capsules streamline the entire vaping process — pre-pack at home and simply insert when it’s time to session. No spills, no handling herb on the fly. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.

specs.label: Chamber
specs.value: Approx. 0.3 g dry herb per capsule
